description: Enable hex-agent to discover and call tools from external MCP servers via stdio transport

tasks.name: MCP domain types
tasks.description: Define JsonRpcMessage, McpTool, McpToolResult, McpServerConfig, McpConnection types

tasks.name: McpClientPort trait
tasks.description: Define IMcpClientPort with connect, list_tools, call_tool, disconnect methods

tasks.name: Stdio MCP transport
tasks.description: Spawn MCP server process, JSON-RPC 2.0 over stdin/stdout, initialization handshake, connection lifecycle

tasks.name: MCP config loader
tasks.description: Read mcpServers from .claude/settings.json (project + user level), merge configs

tasks.name: MCP tool discovery usecase
tasks.description: Connect to configured MCP servers, call tools/list, prefix names with mcp__<server>__, merge with builtins

tasks.name: Extend tool dispatcher
tasks.description: Route tool_use calls to built-in OR MCP tools based on mcp__ prefix

tasks.name: Wire MCP client into main.rs
tasks.description: Initialize MCP client, load configs, run discovery, pass merged tools to ConversationLoop

tasks.name: Integration tests
tasks.description: Test with mock MCP server: connection, tool discovery, tool call, error handling, timeout
